signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Deal Reached — Bitcoin Rockets to $72,700 While Oil Crashes 16%** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Deal Reached — Bitcoin Rockets to $72,700 While Oil Crashes 16%** | YES | HIGH confidence

Both the US and Iran claimed victory after a two-week ceasefire, resolving weeks of geopolitical tension that had weighed on crypto markets[1]. This diplomatic resolution directly moved Bitcoin, which surged to $72,700 following the announcement[1].

signals.headline: Bitcoin Consolidating Near $74,600 Amid Mixed Institutional Flows** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Consolidating Near $74,600 Amid Mixed Institutional Flows** | YES | HIGH confidence

As of mid-April, Bitcoin has stabilized in a consolidation range near $74,600, with BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF recording over $817 million in inflows, demonstrating sustained institutional demand[2]. However, ETF flows remain inconsistent overall, with a $55 million outflow recorded on April 16[2].
